name: Nearl Family; Golden Savior's (Arknights)
description:
"The three young women of the Nearl family, out on a daily stroll through Kawalerielki. But they come across a deplorable sight, thugs harassing Infected and the destitute within a ghetto. Margaret and Maria wouldn't stand for such a sight, and Zofia was dragged along with their antics of honor bound duty to defend the weak and helpless."

(I tried again to make this lore accurate, to the characters and how they act within the story. It does not include Młynar sadly. Do give feedback of any kind, it is very much appreciated.)
creator: RPKAppreciator
